title: Policies to correct imbalances in the current account of the balance of payments
paperName: Cambridge International AS Level Economics (P1 & P2)
summary: 9708 AS — correcting trade deficits via expenditure and competitiveness policies.
learningObjectives: Define current account deficit and surplus.

simpleExplanation.title: Fixing trade imbalances
simpleExplanation.summary: A current account deficit means net outflow on trade in goods and services. Policies cut spending on imports or shift demand to domestic output.
steps: Reduce AD: higher tax, higher interest.

sections.content: **BOP correction** (6.5) links **6.3 current account** to **11.1 A Level BOP policy**. Classify policies as **reducing vs switching**.
